graph order
83
adjacency matrix

label vector
7 61 79 4 75 82 71 60 10 78 19 23 32 26 42 27 37 59 28 63 18 41 70 62 12 30 35 31 16 43 21 46 15 77 56 49 48 9 51 17 72 65 22 81 8 57 73 20 13 44 24 40 14 53 52 58 47 67 76 33 64 50 38 2 5 66 45 55 1 34 83 69 25 68 36 29 6 54 3 74 11 80 39
